issues.claim: Analog does not contradict traditional meaning
issues.objection: Distortion test for 7.29: the engineering analog does not contradict the convergence of Shankara, Ramanuja, Prabhupada, and editorial readings logged in traditional_meaning_consensus. STRETCHED tag honestly bounds the operational scope; the metaphysical reach is preserved at source-pack level and not claimed by the engineering layer. Reverse-translation of the analog yields a stance compatible with the verse, not in tension with it.

notes: Distortion test for 7.29: traditional meanings preserved alongside engineering layer. PASS.
